name: Spiced Fruit Bars
recipeIngredient: 1 cup C and H Golden Brown Sugar (firmly packed)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the sugar and butter until smooth.
2. Beat in the egg and vanilla extract.
3. Gradually mix in the flour, baking powder, salt, cinnamon, nutmeg, and cloves until just combined.
4. Stir in the dried glazed fruit.
5. Pour the batter into a greased 11 x 7-inch pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for 25 minutes or until set.
7. Allow the bars to cool slightly, then spread with powdered sugar glaze.
8. Dust with additional powdered sugar if desired.
Powdered Sugar Glaze:
1/2 cup (unsifted) C and H Powdered Sugar
2 teaspoons Water
